Green.title: Green Realm
Green.lore: Rooted in the lush foliage of the Sanctuary, ducks hailing from the Green realm are infused with raw vitality and natural growth. They are the caretakers of the wetlands, bound to the rhythm of life and ever-renewing energy.

Blue.title: Blue Waters
Blue.lore: Born amidst tranquil open waters, ducks against the Blue backdrop carry a serene, unflappable demeanor. They represent steady leadership, deep mutual trust, and the unwavering stability that holds the flock together during chaotic tides.

Yellow.title: Yellow Radiance
Yellow.lore: Basking in eternal golden sunlight, those from the Yellow realm embody pure joy and infectious optimism. Their presence brings warmth to the nest, lifting spirits and reminding the Sanctuary of brighter tomorrows.

Orange.title: Orange Flare
Orange.lore: Ignited by a vibrant burst of creative fire, Orange ducks radiate boundless energy and enthusiastic spirit. They are the spark plug of the Sanctuary—innovators and bold visionaries who turn wild ideas into reality.

Purple.title: Purple Domain
Purple.lore: Shrouded in royal mist and ancient wisdom, the Purple background marks ducks of rare spiritual depth and noble standing. They act as the Sanctuary's sages and guardians of sacred avian lore.

Red.title: Red Pulse
Red.lore: Driven by a fierce and burning heart, Red background ducks are propelled by raw passion and decisive urgency. They thrive on intensity, taking immediate action whenever the Sanctuary faces a sudden challenge.
